title: Tom’s Pride
description: The story turns back to Tom, Iceburg, and Franky, showing the pride and dream behind the Sea Train.
scene: Across pages 19, 20, 21, 22, this part follows Franky, Tom, Kalifa, Blueno, Paulie. The story turns back to Tom, Iceburg, and Franky, showing the pride and dream behind the Sea Train.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: 'Cause I got business with you too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: What're you doing with these guys?!!

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: A goal that can't be achieved...

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: If I stay with you people!!!

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: I don't have to tell you.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: don't try to under- stand her....!!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Are you crazy, nice Nico Robin?!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: I will not let anyone interfere!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: What's Wrong With You, Nico Robin!?

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: Are you really... OUR ENEMY!!? Nico Robin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: This mansion will be engaged in flames.

summary: The story turns back to Tom, Iceburg, and Franky, showing the pride and dream behind the Sea Train.
